creator: luna@unixpoet.dev
text: I can see several issues with this position. First, the 3.x branch won't be receiving further updates. In general, the ports tree does not provide ports for software that upstream has abandoned. Second, foregoing or postponing updating ports because they have known bugs will mean nothing ever gets updated; all software has bugs. The most useful things one can do at this point are either to be patient or provide a patch for the port.
